$comment: claudit hardened reference settings. Each block is annotated with the CC-* check it satisfies. This file is the canonical known-good fixture and must scan with zero findings.

permissions.$comment: CC-PERM-001: no bypassPermissions/acceptEdits default. CC-PERM-002/003: no broad or dangerous unscoped Bash allows.

env.$comment: CC-ENV-001/CC-SECRET-001: no endpoint redirection, no hardcoded tokens. Reference secrets via the shell environment only.

hooks.$comment: CC-HOOK-001..004: local absolute-path scripts, no remote exec, no network in context-injecting events, explicit timeouts.
